commentary_links.hebrew: אִם־עֹלָ֤ה קׇרְבָּנוֹ֙ מִן־הַבָּקָ֔ר זָכָ֥ר תָּמִ֖ים יַקְרִיבֶ֑נּוּ אֶל־פֶּ֜תַח אֹ֤הֶל מוֹעֵד֙ יַקְרִ֣יב אֹת֔וֹ לִרְצֹנ֖וֹ לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
commentary_links.english: If yourayour In this chapter, Heb. 3rd-person references to the offerer are rendered in the 2nd person, in accord with v. 2. offering is a burnt offering from the herd, you shall make your offering a male without blemish. You shall bring it to the entrance of the Tent of Meeting, for acceptance in your behalf before GOD.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִם־מִן־הַצֹּ֨אן קׇרְבָּנ֧וֹ מִן־הַכְּשָׂבִ֛ים א֥וֹ מִן־הָעִזִּ֖ים לְעֹלָ֑ה זָכָ֥ר תָּמִ֖ים יַקְרִיבֶֽנּוּ׃
commentary_links.english: If your offering for a burnt offering is from the flock, of sheep or of goats, you shall make your offering a male without blemish.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִ֧ם מִן־הָע֛וֹף עֹלָ֥ה קׇרְבָּנ֖וֹ לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה וְהִקְרִ֣יב מִן־הַתֹּרִ֗ים א֛וֹ מִן־בְּנֵ֥י הַיּוֹנָ֖ה אֶת־קׇרְבָּנֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english: If your offering to G<small>OD</small> is a burnt offering of birds, you shall choose your offering from turtledoves or pigeons.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְזֹ֥את תּוֹרַ֖ת הָאָשָׁ֑ם קֹ֥דֶשׁ קׇֽדָשִׁ֖ים הֽוּא׃
commentary_links.english: This is the ritual of the reparation offering: it is most holy.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וזאת תורת המנחה &star או דלמא כיון דאמר

commentary_links.hebrew: וְזֹ֥את תּוֹרַ֖ת הַמִּנְחָ֑ה הַקְרֵ֨ב אֹתָ֤הּ בְּנֵֽי־אַהֲרֹן֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶל־פְּנֵ֖י הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
commentary_links.english: And this is the ritual of the grain offering: Aaron’s sons shall present it before G<small>OD</small>, in front of the altar.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וזאת תורת המנחה &star או דלמא כיון דאמר
